code:
import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn advance(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn color_name(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

mut color = Color.Red

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  if tok == "next"
    color = advance(color)
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(color_name(color))
